response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song 'いーあるふぁんくらぶ' (1-2 Fan Club) by Mikito-P via on-screen text. Used the search query 'いーあるふぁんくらぶ Mikito-P Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. The video contains a full song performance followed by banter.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual stage performance of '1-2 Fan Club' by two VTubers (Roboco-san and another), followed by a post-performance dialogue session.

scenes.description: Virtual performance of '1-2 Fan Club' by two VTubers.
scenes.song_title: いーあるふぁんくらぶ (1-2 Fan Club)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
だんだん君と同じ言葉が使えるね
ハイハイチャイナ ちょちょ夢心地
いーあるふぁんくらぶ
だんだん君の伝えたい気持ちがわかってく
うぉーあいにー 言わせてよ
うぉーあいにー 言えるかな
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Gradually I can use the same words as you
High high China, a little dreamlike,
1-2 Fanclub!
Gradually I'm beginning to understand the feelings you want to convey,
"Wǒ ài nǐ" (I love you), let me say it,
"Wǒ ài nǐ" (I love you), I wonder if I can say it?

scenes.description: Post-performance dialogue/banter between the two VTubers.
